data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for Instagram bio link integration.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the Instagram bio link integration, but the evidence provided does not confirm its existence or functionality. The linked use case outlines the need for this integration, yet there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that it has been implemented or is operational. Therefore, the requirement remains unfulfilled, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of an Instagram bio link integration.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
